completed: Fixed faculty dashboard visibility for co-curricular items
Resolved duplicate React keys in dashboard summary map
Implemented item-specific filtering for faculty pending portal
Enhanced approvalController with precise query filters
Changed default approval sorting to Roll Number in faculty portal
Restricted Request Type filter options dynamically based on user role in Pending.jsx
HoD My Classes navigation: pass facultyId in route state so Pending page filters to that class's approvals
approvalController: support optional facultyId query param with role-based permission check
approvalController: cast all IDs to mongoose.Types.ObjectId to prevent string/ObjectId mismatch
Pending.jsx: persist My Classes navigation context in sessionStorage (survives page refresh)
History.jsx: persist My Classes navigation context in sessionStorage (survives page refresh)
Pending.jsx: Clear All Filters also wipes sessionStorage context and resets facultyId

decisions.decision: Use unique key (batchId + type + itemId) instead of just batchId in Dashboard.jsx
decisions.trade_offs: Slightly more complex grouping logic in frontend

decisions.context: Unnecessary filter options cluttering UI for normal faculty
decisions.decision: Calculate request type options dynamically based on user role using useMemo
decisions.trade_offs: None, improves UX by hiding non-applicable filter options

decisions.context: Refresh from My Classes queue view reset all filters to defaults
decisions.decision: Use sessionStorage with key 'pending_nav_ctx' / 'history_nav_ctx' to persist navigation context; clear it on fresh navigation or when user explicitly clears filters
decisions.trade_offs: State persists only for the browser tab session, cleared when the tab is closed — this is intentional to avoid stale cross-session context
